metadata.description: Exploratory search across Upwork, LinkedIn, X, and Reddit

config.instructions: Execute multi-source harvesting. Search Upwork, LinkedIn, X, and Reddit for 'help wanted' or 'how do I' signals in Notion, AI Automation, and Workflow niches. Target low-impact jobs that can be delivered quickly.
Identify the best 'Proven & Tested' solution from the Weave (e.g., 7-Stage Pipeline assets, HTML Gameplans) to address the scouted pain point. Favor high-leverage, low-impact deliveries.
Validate the solution and pitch data against MIRA mandates and the 1% Rule. Ensure all revenue and engagement projections are empirically grounded.

metadata.description: Generates NotebookLM assets and tailored copy

config.instructions: Construct the NotebookLM pitch asset. Focus on 'Operational Relief' and 'Spec Work' (e.g., 'I built a prototype for you').

metadata.description: Executes delivery and monitors for engagement

config.instructions: Execute the delivery via the Neural Relay/GAS Bridge. Initialize the background listener for 'YES' or 'BLUEPRINT' replies.

metadata.description: Final quality gate and lineage logger

config.instructions: Log the mission's lineage and final fidelity scores to .mira/scores/multi_source_performance.json.
